bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=operations Items: 3 · Forecasts emitted: 0 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-22 · [fact_correction] 复核房地产周报旧 QA 缺陷

IN_PROGRESS · owner=operations

复核 2026-06-14 房地产周报旧 QA 缺陷，针对深圳前海毛利率成本口径/算术疑点、绿城管理 GFA 英文单位冲突形成修订提案。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-22 · [fact_correction] 为 PE 增加历史退市公司标签

IN_PROGRESS · owner=operations

给 PE 打“历史退市公司 / 不可交易”运营标签。防止下游简报将 8.62 USD/share、sell/卖出 当作当前交易建议。

  • Status: in progress

2026-06-22 · [fact_correction] 更新碳配额事实卡口径

IN_PROGRESS · owner=operations

将碳配额事实卡更新为“2026 年内启动有偿分配概率很低；3%–5% 是未来初始力度参数；2027–2028 才更像试点窗口”。

  • Status: in progress
